description: Boards for planning, tracking, and managing projects including kanban workflows, sprint cycles, roadmaps, and timeline views

knowledge.name: Design Philosophy
knowledge.description: Why PM boards exist, Kanban theory of constraints, Zeigarnik effect, color-status mapping, and historical context from Toyota to digital era

knowledge.name: Layout Patterns
knowledge.description: Five patterns (Kanban Columns, Sprint Board, Timeline/Gantt, Roadmap, Dashboard) with ASCII diagrams, card design specs, and status color systems

knowledge.name: Visual Guide
knowledge.description: Four color palettes, PM typography scale, card design states, progress bars, burndown indicators, icon system, and accessibility guidelines

knowledge.name: Content Guide
knowledge.description: Content by board type (Kanban, Sprint, Timeline, Roadmap, Dashboard), task writing rules, description templates, and metrics tables

knowledge.name: Build Process
knowledge.description: Six-phase workflow with PM-specific Miro API code, grid calculations, card creation, timeline bars, and dependency connectors

knowledge.name: Examples Reference
knowledge.description: Five detailed examples (Sprint, Roadmap, Kanban, Gantt, Dashboard), anti-patterns, transformations, and design elements to steal

knowledge.name: Variations
knowledge.description: Industry adaptations (SaaS, Healthcare, Construction, Agency), team sizes, complexity levels, cultural considerations, and cross-board integrations

templates.name: Project Overview
templates.description: High-level project dashboard showing goals, milestones, team, risks, and status at a glance

templates.name: Kanban Board
templates.description: Column-based workflow board with swim lanes for managing tasks through stages from backlog to done

templates.name: Sprint Planning
templates.description: Agile sprint board with backlog grooming, capacity planning, sprint goals, and story point estimation

templates.name: Roadmap
templates.description: Quarterly product or project roadmap with swimlanes for teams, themes, and dependency tracking

templates.name: Gantt Timeline
templates.description: Timeline-based project schedule with task dependencies, milestones, and resource allocation
